realm.name: gateway-admin
realm.description: Full administrative access to the Fluid Intelligence gateway

realm.name: platform_admin
realm.description: Maps to ContextForge platform_admin RBAC role — grants admin.dashboard and all permissions

realm.name: gateway-user
realm.description: Standard user access to the Fluid Intelligence gateway

realm.name: gateway-readonly
realm.description: Read-only access to the Fluid Intelligence gateway

clients.name: Fluid Bootstrap Service Account
clients.description: Service account for gateway bootstrap operations (backend registration, health checks)

clients.name: Fluid Intelligence Gateway
clients.description: Gateway client used for audience validation — tokens must include fluid-gateway in aud claim

clientScopes.name: realm-roles
clientScopes.description: Includes realm roles in JWT tokens

clientScopes.name: fluid-audience
clientScopes.description: Adds fluid-gateway to the aud claim for audience validation

clientScopes.name: fluid-session
clientScopes.description: Includes session ID (sid) in JWT claims for session correlation and audit trails
